children.name: Subhead
children.text_content: The task: Test the Slate’s limit in the harshest environments.

children.name: mj-text
children.text_content: From the Davis Dam to the Vegas Strip, our team calibrated, validated, hauled—and hydrated—to prove that a Slate can take the heat. Engineers call this a “hot trip” and it’s exactly what it sounds like. Sweltering. Grab your sunscreen and come along for the ride.

children.name: mj-text
children.text_content:
2716 Daley Drive, Troy, MI 48083
